steps.title: Read two points on the line
steps.content: The line of best fit slopes downward. Two clear approximate points on the line are $(0,14)$ and $(13,0)$.

steps.title: Match by sign and size
steps.content: The slope must be negative because the line falls from left to right. The value closest to $-1.08$ is $-1.1$, so choice B is correct.
